sectionDescription: From rescuing a pre-launch startup app to architecting my own SaaS and building enterprise-grade digital platforms, here's how I've grown as a developer.

items.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Rescued and rebuilt a failing Flutter app from the ground up, going from 0% stability to production-ready in under 8 weeks.
Sole responsible for all architecture decisions, technical roadmap, and product delivery as the lead engineer of the project.
Refactored 100% of core modules, eliminated tightly coupled dependencies, and established clean architectural boundaries across the codebase.
Configured and managed App Store & Google Play infrastructure, delivering the app's first successful public release.

items.title: Founder & Full Stack Developer
bullets: Designed and built a multi-tenant SaaS platform end-to-end, replacing spreadsheet-based workflows with a structured client management system.
Architected a secure backend with Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Auth) supporting per-workspace data isolation and real-time sync.
Designed the full UI/UX system in Figma — 50+ screens across onboarding, client management, training plans, and nutrition flows.
Currently developing and iterating on the product, refining features, data structures, and user flows based on real-world use cases.

items.title: AI Summer Intern
bullets: Explored the use of local LLMs (Ollama) for internal AI applications.
Prototyped a chatbot to answer questions about internal APIs and CMS tools.
Built the chat interface and integrated it with the LLM.
Improved response accuracy through prompt and context design.

items.title: Frontend Developer Intern
bullets: Built the frontend of a client onboarding platform for financial institutions, streamlining account creation and approval workflows.
Built pixel-perfect, accessible, and high-performance interfaces, ensuring consistency across devices and screen sizes.
Implemented a scalable CMS with Directus (REST/GraphQL) enabling non-technical teams to manage onboarding flows autonomously.
Prototyped an internal AI chatbot, integrating a local LLM with internal APIs and CMS data for real-time access to company information.
